name: Chicken'n' Peaches Piquante
recipeIngredient: 4 skinned and boned chicken breast halves, about 5 oz each
1/2 cup red bell pepper, coarsely chopped
15 1/2 ounces canned sliced peaches, drained (reserve liquid separately)
2 tablespoons chopped fresh cilantro leaves or parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
2. In a large nonstick skillet over Medium-High heat, heat the olive oil. Add the chicken; cook for 9-10 minutes, turning once, until no longer pink in the center. Remove to a platter.
3. Add the bell pepper to the skillet and reduce the heat. Cook and stir for 2 minutes until crisp-tender.
4. Return the reserved peach liquid, salsa, and orange juice concentrate to the skillet. Bring to a boil, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
5. Add the peaches and cilantro; cook and stir for 3 minutes until hot. Return the chicken to the platter and pour the sauce over it. Serve glazed with sauce and peaches.
Makes 4 servings.
